mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.zu_id AS "zu.id", a.group_id AS "group.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
zu.name AS "zu.name",
`group`.idno AS "group.idno", `group`.name AS "group.name"
LEFT JOIN t_kejian_zu zu ON zu.id = a.zu_id LEFT JOIN t_group `group` ON `group`.id = a.group_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_kejian_zu_group( id, zu_id, group_id, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{zu.id}, #{group.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
